title: Automation Engineer (PLC / SCADA)
description:
Company Overview / Employee Value Proposition

LINKWISE TECHNOLOGY PTE. LTD. is a corporate headquartered in Singapore that focuses on continuous research, design, development and manufacturing of M2M technologies and control system. With its associate offices and warehouse in Malaysia, Indonesia, Philippines and Pakistan. Linkwise has been a pioneer solution provider in the field of facilities monitoring, control and automation fields in South East Asia, North America as well as European markets.

Founded in 1998, Linkwise Technology Pte Ltd is rapidly growing and is currently seeking for a proactive, goal-oriented and highly motivated professional to join our team

Job Summary

You will design and develop automation and monitoring systems using controllers, PLC, and HMI, delivering reliable solutions that enhance operational efficiency. You will lead on-site testing and commissioning activities, collaborate with external stakeholders to ensure project success, and provide training and technical support to empower users.

Responsibilities

  • Design and develop automation and monitoring systems using controllers, PLC, and HMI to meet client specifications and operational requirements
  • Conduct on-site testing and commissioning of automation systems to ensure functionality and compliance with project standards
  • Collaborate effectively with external parties including end-users, consultants, and contractors to align project objectives and resolve technical issues
  • Deliver training sessions and provide technical support to users to facilitate smooth system operation and adoption
  • Prepare and maintain comprehensive project documentation to support system maintenance and future upgrades

Required competencies and certifications

  • Diploma in Computer Science, Engineering (Electrical/Electronic), or Automation

Preferred competencies and qualifications

  • Knowledge of SCADA systems, PLC, and HMI technologies
  • Familiarity with communication protocols such as Modbus RTU/Modbus TCP and SNMP
  • Basic ability to interpret technical datasheets for system design and troubleshooting
  • Foundational knowledge of networking and databases including SQL, PostgreSQL, and MySQL
  • Basic understanding of electrical circuits and wiring
  • Preferably 1-3 years of relevant experience in automation system design and implementation
